title: Dashboard v3 — Apple redesign + inner pages
subtitle: Migrate from Linear-dark single-page to an Apple-minimal hub with four inner-page sections, shared data-driven renderer, and auto/toggle theming. Shipped same-day on user's request.

blocks.label: Result
blocks.text: All four inner-page types live. Hub redesigned. Theme auto-follows OS with a toggle. Feedback page shipped. Cron infra next.

blocks.markdown:
## What changed

- **Design tokens**: Linear dark → Apple light-first with dark variant. Single blue accent (`#0071e3` / `#2997ff`), SF Pro, pill CTAs, card-based elevation.
- **Theming**: auto-follows `prefers-color-scheme`; manual override via header toggle persists in localStorage.
- **Inner-page framework**: one `page.html` + `page-render.js` that reads `data/pages/<kind>/<slug>.json`. Block types: `prose`, `code`, `callout`, `quote`, `embed`, `checklist`, `gallery`, `html`.
- **Section index pages**: one `section.html` that renders `data/pages/<kind>/index.json`.
- **Feedback page**: reads `decisions.json` + `pending-review.json`, lets Wenxuan tap answers, copy as chat reply.
- **Hub additions**: `drilldown-cards` section type — each card links to an inner section.

## Architecture diagram

```
/                                (hub, data/latest.json)
├── /section.html?kind=papers    (papers index)
│   └── /page.html?path=papers/<slug>
├── /section.html?kind=learning  (MAE knowledge map)
│   └── /page.html?path=learning/<slug>
├── /section.html?kind=projects  (side projects)
│   └── /page.html?path=projects/<slug>
├── /section.html?kind=experiments
│   └── /page.html?path=experiments/<slug>
├── /proposal.html               (proposals index + reader)
├── /feedback.html               (decisions, pending, quick note)
└── /archive.html                (past briefs)
```

## What I skipped in v3.0

- Server-side form submission for `/feedback` (current flow: pick → copy → paste in Feishu). Needs GitHub Actions + commit-back. Will land in v3.1 with cron infra.
- Chart block with live p5.js viz. Stubbed as `html` block — real p5 integration next.
- Proper light-mode contrast check on every section (done for main sections; inner-page markdown tables unchecked).

## Files touched (new or rewritten)

- `assets/style.css` — rewritten for Apple tokens, both themes
- `assets/render.js` — theme bootstrap + `drilldown-cards` type
- `assets/page-render.js` — **new**, generic inner-page renderer
- `page.html` — **new**, single inner-page shell
- `section.html` — **new**, single section-index shell
- `feedback.html` — **new**
- `data/pages/{papers,learning,projects,experiments}/` — **new**, one index + seed pages each

blocks.text: Apple shell, drill-down depth, auto theme, one feedback surface. Data stays king.
